choose.when: SELECT ectcc_id, ectcc_tit, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_dc FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2000' AND cmmn_cd = ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd ) AS bsns_prgs_div_dc, ( SELECT korname FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 WHERE empno = drafter_empno ) AS emp_nm, drft_de FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE lnk_esntl_id = #{dsuseEsntlId} ORDER BY ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, ectcc_seq
choose.otherwise:
SELECT ectcc_id, ectcc_tit, bsns_prgs_div_dc, emp_nm, drft_de FROM ( SELECT ectcc_id, ectcc_tit, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_dc FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2000' AND cmmn_cd = ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd ) AS bsns_prgs_div_dc, ( SELECT korname FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 WHERE empno = drafter_empno ) AS emp_nm, drft_de FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE lnk_esntl_id = #{planEsntlId} ORDER BY ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, ectcc_seq )
UNION ALL SELECT ectcc_id, ectcc_tit, bsns_prgs_div_dc, emp_nm, drft_de FROM ( SELECT ectcc_id, ectcc_tit, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_dc FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2000' AND cmmn_cd = ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd ) AS bsns_prgs_div_dc, ( SELECT korname FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 WHERE empno = drafter_empno ) AS emp_nm, drft_de FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE lnk_esntl_id = #{cnstrcEsntlId} ORDER BY ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, ectcc_seq )

mapper.select: SELECT lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, ectcc_id, ectcc_tit, relt_doc_no, ectcc_seq, drft_de, drft_dept_cd, drafter_empno, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE lnk_esntl_id = #{planEsntlId} OR lnk_esntl_id = #{cnstrcEsntlId} OR lnk_esntl_id = #{dsuseEsntlId} ORDER BY ectcc_seq
mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_ECTCC_LNK_Dao_insertEctcc */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk ( lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, ectcc_id, ectcc_tit, relt_doc_no, ectcc_seq, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id, drft_de, drft_dept_cd, drafter_empno ) VALUES ( #{lnkEsntlId}, #{ecsBsnsPrgsDivCd}, #{ectccId}, #{ectccTit}, #{reltDocNo}, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(ectcc_seq) + 1, 0) FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE lnk_esntl_id = #{lnkEsntlId} AND ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd = #{ecsBsnsPrgsDivCd} ), sysdate, #{frstRgstrId}, sysdate, #{lastUpdusrId}, #{drftDe}, #{drftDeptCd}, #{drafterEmpno} )
